![][./client/public/SWbanner.png]

![][./client/public/SWlogo.png]![][./client/public/WhiteLogo.png]

**STXWORX: Unlocking Creative Work on Bitcoin via Stacks**

**A Decentralized Freelance Marketplace Powered by STX, sBTC & USDCx**

**Version 1.7 – April 2026**  
**Developed by White Fintech**

**Live at: [https://stxworx.com](https://stxworx.com)**

**Abstract**

STXWORX is a live Stacks-native decentralized freelance marketplace connecting clients with global designers and creatives. Projects are funded via escrow, milestones release on-chain, and disputes are handled by admin moderation. Payments use **STX**, **sBTC**, and **USDCx**.

A transparent **10% platform fee** applies: **9%** supports operations and growth, while **1%** is automatically routed via Clarity smart contract to **Stacks Africa** for tech education, developer training, and blockchain initiatives.

The platform already includes enhanced social layers: **user timeline (Main Feed)** with likes/comments/shares, **CHAT** functionality, friend requests, X connect integration, and email binding options. Upcoming expansions include BNB payments and a full suite of **50+ designer & creator tools** (heavy AI integration).

**1\. Introduction**

Bitcoin security \+ Stacks programmability \+ USDCx stability \= real creative utility on-chain.

**2\. The Problem**

Centralized platforms like Fiverr and Upwork suffer from:

* Mandatory KYC barriers excluding many creators  
* Withdrawal delays and funds stuck for weeks  
* Arbitrary account suspensions  
* Corporate bulk fake accounts dominating rankings  
* Difficulty for new talent to gain visibility  
* PayPal/Payoneer freezes and regional restrictions  
* Excessive fees (10–20% \+ processor charges)

**3\. The STXWORX Solution**

No KYC required for core access. Instant on-chain withdrawals. Censorship-resistant. Transparent on-chain reputation via NFTs. Fair visibility through quality work and bounties. Direct crypto payments. Low 10% fee with built-in social impact.

Live features (verified on stxworx.com): escrow-style job funding, milestone-based tasks, community-driven posts, STX payments, and enhanced social layers.

**4\. Platform Fee Structure & Social Impact**

* Total fee: **10%** of transaction value  
* **9%** → Platform sustainability, development, marketing, rewards  
* **1%** → Hard-coded to **Stacks Africa** (education, hackathons, youth empowerment)

**5\. Technical Architecture**

* Frontend: React \+ Stacks.js \+ Hiro Wallet  
* Smart Contracts: Clarity — escrow, multi-asset payments, 10% fee split, referrals, bounties  
* Reputation: On-chain NFTs  
* Storage: Gaia/IPFS for attachments

**6\. Token Economics & Utility**

Fully asset-native (STX, sBTC, USDCx). 1% to Stacks Africa is immutable on-chain.

**7\. Ambassador, Marketer & Community Program**

Form-based applications, scoring rubric, tiers, KPIs (sign-ups, volume, referrals), on-chain tracking \+ automated payouts.

**8\. Website Pages & Descriptions (Live at stxworx.com)**

The live site features a clean, community-first design with wallet connect (Guest/Member) and real-time interaction.

* **Home / Landing Page**: Hero banner “JOIN THE ULTIMATE COMMUNITY FOR DESIGNERS AND CREATIVES.” Search freelancers bar, “Connect Wallet” button, live stats (Featured Open Jobs, Top Freelancers, Completed Jobs), and “Get Featured” section. Mission: “BUILD THE FUTURE OF DECENTRALIZED TECH.”  
* **Marketplace / Browse Jobs Page**: Top Featured Jobs with “Explore All” link. Examples include “Wallpaper Design” (0.1 STX, Media & Content) and “Write a Sample Post” (1 STX, Marketing). Filters by category, budget (STX), and “Apply Now” buttons.  
* **Freelancer Profiles Page**: Public profiles (e.g., /profile/white, /profile/chiboy) showing bio, skills, and activity.  
* **Dashboard Page**: Post-wallet connect area showing active contracts, earnings, and quick actions. Includes prominent **CHAT** button for messaging.  
* **Creator Tools Suite Page** (Planned full rollout): Hub for **50+ professional designer & creator tools** with heavy AI integration (AI design like Figma AI/Adobe Firefly, AI content/video like Jasper/ElevenLabs/Synthesia, plus classic tools). Users create and deliver work inside the platform.  
* **Community Feed / Timeline Page**: Live “Main Feed” serving as the **user timeline**. Posts include GM messages, thanks, event shares (with X links and \#stxworx hashtag), timestamps, likes, comments, and “Share Open” options. Fully interactive and real-time.  
* **Social Features (Already Implemented)**:  
  * **Timeline**: Main Feed with personal and community activity, likes, comments, shares.  
  * **Chat Options**: Dedicated **CHAT** functionality for direct messaging and job discussions.  
  * **Friend Requests**: Network building via follows, mentions (@username), and connection options.  
  * **X Connect**: Direct X/Twitter integration — share posts, link spaces, and import social proof.  
  * **Email Bind**: Available for notifications, recovery, and updates while keeping wallet as primary login.  
* **Bounties & Referrals Page**: Community tasks (job-style bounties) and referral system for earning shares.  
* **Payments & Wallet Page**: Wallet connect, STX balances, transaction history, and escrow status.  
* **About / Impact Page**: Vision, team (OV-MARS / White Fintech), 1% royalty to Stacks Africa details, and partnership calls.  
* **Support / Help Center**: FAQs and contact for collaborations/ambassador roles.

**9\. Upcoming Features & Roadmap**

* **Q2 2026**: Current live features strengthened (social layers already active).  
* **Q3 2026**: Reputation NFTs expansion. Mobile app, DAO governance.  
* **Q4 2026**: BNB Chain integration for BNB payments \+ full 50+ AI-enhanced creator tools suite.

**10\. Team & Vision**

Led by OV-MARS, White Fintech founder.

**11\. Risks & Mitigations**

Clarity audits ensure contract security. Full on-chain transparency for fees and actions.

**Conclusion**

STXWORX (live at stxworx.com) solves centralized platform pain with a censorship-resistant, low-fee, Bitcoin-secured experience. Enhanced social layers — timeline feed, chat, friend requests, X connect, and email binding — are already active, creating a true community workspace. The 1% to Stacks Africa adds real impact. With upcoming BNB payments and 50+ AI tools, STXWORX becomes the ultimate decentralized hub for creators.

This is utility with purpose — work that earns, connects, and gives back.
